summary: Tested Inspections tab enhancements: clickable summary cards with filter badges, tabs moved to header, Add New Inspection button removed, and new Schedule modal for unscheduled inspections with Vaahan API integration. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Scheduled one unscheduled inspection (Priya - Silver package) with vehicle KA48N1000 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inspections tab enhancements fully tested. Summary cards are clickable and filter data table. Tabs (Unscheduled/Scheduled) are in header. Schedule modal works with Vaahan API vehicle search.

summary_cards_clickable.details: All 4 summary cards (Total, Scheduled, Completed, Unscheduled) are clickable and filter the data table. Active card shows ring highlight.

filter_indicator_badge.details: Clicking a card shows 'Filtered: {type}' badge with X button to clear filter. Tested all 4 card types.

tabs_in_header.details: Unscheduled and Scheduled tabs are positioned in page header (top right) beside page title. Shows count in parentheses.

add_new_inspection_button_removed.details: Add New Inspection button is no longer present on the page.

schedule_button_on_unscheduled.details: Each unscheduled inspection row has a 'Schedule' button that opens the Schedule modal.

schedule_modal_fields.details: Schedule modal contains all required fields: Vehicle Number input with Search button, Date picker, Time picker, City dropdown, Address textarea.

vaahan_api_vehicle_search.details: Vehicle search with KA48N1000 returned vehicle details: Ford India PVT LTD - 3.2 Endeavour 4 4 AT Titanium, Year: 2017, Fuel: Diesel. Toast shows 'Vehicle details found!'

schedule_submission.details: Submitting schedule modal successfully schedules the inspection. Toast shows 'Inspection scheduled successfully!'. Tab auto-switches to Scheduled. Counts update correctly (Scheduled: 20→21, Unscheduled: 4→3).
